ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., approved, pending, done) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected end date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project (e.g., print, digital, outdoor) */,
  "project_template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project template used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was last updated */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_template_id") REFERENCES project_templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the client operates in */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the client */,
  "client_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member responsible for the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_client_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_manager_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member in the agency (e.g., designer, manager) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team member */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date when the team member was hired */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the team member */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the team member (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the member is assigned to */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member assigned */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role the team member has in the project */,
  "date_assigned" TEXT /* Date when the team member was assigned to the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_assignments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_assignments_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project linked to the budget */,
  "allocated_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "spent_budget" REAL /* Total amount spent on the project */,
  "remaining_budget" REAL /* Remaining budget available for the project */,
  "estimated_budget" REAL /* Estimated budget at the start of the project */,
  "actual_budget" REAL /* Actual budget spent */,
  "budget_revisions" INTEGER /* Number of times the budget has been revised */,
  "last_revised_date" TEXT /* Date when the budget was last revised */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color code for the status (e.g., green for approved, red for pending) */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is the default status for new projects */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient of the notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of project performance */,
  "financials" REAL /* Financial details for the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the team member who created the report */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the team member who reviewed the report */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the template */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the template was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the template was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the team member who created the template */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the team member who last updated the template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_templates_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_templates_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the team member who created the role */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the team member who last updated the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id")
)
